reasoning_content: Let me add some quick debug fprintf to EmitIR to find where the crash happens with func_defn test case. The pattern is: there are two function declarations (func and main), where func has parameters. The DeclRefExpr handler might crash when trying to resolve a local variable.

action.command:
cd /workspace/YatCC && echo 'run build/test/task2/functional-2/030_func_defn.sysu.c/answer.json /tmp/test.ll
bt
quit' | timeout 5 gdb -x /dev/stdin --args ./build/task/3/task3 2>&1 | tail -30 || echo "no gdb"

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && echo 'run build/test/task2/functional-2/030_func_defn.sysu.c/answer.json /tmp/test.ll\nbt\nquit' | timeout 5 gdb -x /dev/stdin --args ./build/task/3/task3 2>&1 | tail -30 || echo \"no gdb\"", "summary": "Try gdb backtrace"}
